texto: The freedom to share one's insights and judgments verbally or in writing is, just like the freedom to think, a holy and inalienabl e right of humanity that, as a universal human right, is above all the rights of princes.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Carl Friedrich Bahrdt: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The freedom to share one's insights and judgments verbally or in writing is, just like the freedo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, freedom, humanity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humanity e rights.
